rationale: No regression in the ADR/process lens after fix 943cc310. (a) Step counts unchanged at 5/5/4/5/5 — all within 3-7; the 18 items were folded into existing numbered steps as sub-detail, not new top-level steps. (b) adr_citations byte-identical (0040/0037/0036/0035/0034/0032/0039); the frontmatter delta is only two cmd/ key_file_paths added to Bead 4 — no alignment or coverage impact. (c) Provenance table consistent with the amended anchors: AC4 += TestPanelTally_AggregatesConcreteChangesRequired + Warn/stale/hard_block rows, AC5/AC6 branch-complete tables, AC7 payload contract, AC10 two-step leaf form, AC11 hard_block phrasing; every AC test-name in the table matches a bead Verification command; new hardening tests sit under existing ACs. (d) `mindspec validate plan 110` (built at 943cc310) exits 0 with only the advisory WARN R=0.14 (<0.15, non-gating). (e) plan-approve gates (ValidatePlan + ValidateWorkChunkAlignment, 5 chunks/5 sections, acyclic in-range deps) still accept it.
findings: Step counts recomputed via the validator's ParseBeadSections rule at 943cc310: B1=5, B2=5, B3=4, B4=5, B5=5 — identical to round 1, all <=7. checkBeadSection emits no bead-steps warning.

adr_citations unchanged (same 7, all Accepted, all intersect impacted domain `workflow`); work_chunks delta is only Bead 4 key_file_paths += cmd/mindspec/root.go, cmd/mindspec/help_golden_test.go — ValidateWorkChunkAlignment unaffected (5 chunks / 5 sections, deps 4<-1,5<-4, acyclic).
